data.title: Donald Trump Reportedly Tapping Brian Quintenz As Head Of Commodity Futures Trading Commission
data.description: Brian Quintenz, a former Republican commissioner of the CFTC and current head of a16z Crypto, is a top contender to lead the agency under Trump, signaling a potential shift in regulatory approach to digital assets.
